text:
On 25/05/2011 20:20, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of www/p5-RT-Authen-ExternalAuth,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/157322 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/157322
> 


Please commit ports/157046 instead of this.
